summary: Iteration 4 - Verified fix for empty-videos rendering. Discover flow for Kochi restaurants leads to PlaceDetail (Paragon) which correctly hides 'Videos analyzed' section and shows deep-dive-cta empty state. CTA link navigates to /analyze?q=Paragon with mode auto-switched to 'specific' and name input pre-filled. Curated place (Jew Town Chai Wallah) regression: videos section renders with video-source-0 and no CTA shown. Home page loads with 6 named trending cards. Backend endpoints healthy.
passed: POST /api/discover Kochi restaurant returns 6 named places with videos:[] (cached, <1s)
POST /api/analyze Bar Basso Milan bar returns 200 in 0.14s (cached)
Discover flow: fill city Kochi + category restaurant, submit, results render
Click first discover card navigates to /place/{id}
'Videos analyzed' header is NOT rendered when place.videos is empty (Paragon)
deep-dive-cta card IS visible with correct heading 'Video sources not indexed for this place yet'
On /analyze?q=Paragon: mode-specific button has bg-scout-ink active class
analyze-name-input is visible and pre-filled with 'Paragon'
Top comments section renders normally below CTA
Regression: curated place Jew Town Chai Wallah shows 'Videos analyzed' with video-source-0 and NO deep-dive-cta
Regression: home page loads with 6 trending place-card names (Jew Town, Aman Tokyo, Ronin, Tim Ho Wan, Sichuan Impression, Bar Basso), no console errors
